constraint-manifold.description: Root axioms: C1=Finitude, C2=Non-Commutation. FATAL on violation. Kernel absolute floor.

abac-policy-engine.description: Deny-by-default access control. Fail-closed. Every evaluation emits provenance.

provenance-chain.description: Append-only audit trail. Deterministic replay. JSONL storage.

ratchet-admission.description: Admission gates. Constraints only tighten (forward_only). Near-duplicate rejection.

translator-boundary.description: Probabilistic/deterministic boundary. LLM output is probabilistic; system state is deterministic.

perception-frame.description: Observation sources: terminal, filesystem, events. Frame assembly with sliding window.

telo-cycle.description: Trial-Error-Learn-Optimize. Self-observing learning loop. Tightens constraints via ratchet.

flowmind_schemas.types: cascading/convergence/job/throttle schemas define the FlowMind type system
flowmind_schemas.system: 7 system FlowMinds form boot-ordered kernel DAG
flowmind_schemas.convergence: 10 buckets: security, compiler, runtime, schemas, protocols, ui, lifecycle, observability, testing, storage

shared_axioms_with_codex_ratchet.C1_FINITUDE: Every structure must have a finite encoding
shared_axioms_with_codex_ratchet.C2_NON_COMMUTATION: Step ordering matters — cycles are violations
shared_axioms_with_codex_ratchet.FAIL_CLOSED: On evaluation failure, deny (never silently allow)

self_proposals.detection: pattern threshold detection → auto-propose → confidence routing

jp_key_insight: YAML as IR works better than markdown for LLM enforcement. The 5 YAML files (behavior-schema + proposals + flowmind-types + flowmind compilation + system-flowmind schema) ARE the first principles. Drop the context packet in and the LLM builds from first principles.
evals_approach: Deterministic runs: input/output/result audit logging. Results determined by separate context window (different agent) for non-biased evaluation. Proof the YAML approach works: re-ran skills after YAML rewrite, measurably better.
